creator: martti.kuparinen@ericsson.com
text:
The current stunnel 2.1 should be updated to 3.x. While waiting for
version 3.3, here is 3.2 as so many users have requested it directly
from me.

How-To-Repeat: 
Apply the following patch as

    # cd /usr/ports/security/stunnel
    # patch -p1 < /tmp/foobar
